metaDescription: Cherish Birth — Alyssa Booth, a Wollongong-based birth doula supporting families through pregnancy, labour, birth and the early days of parenthood.
What a birth doula does, and how non-medical, continuous support can change your pregnancy, labour and birth experience.
Birth doula packages, babywearing sessions and Doula Date Nights with Alyssa Booth in Wollongong and the Illawarra.
Doula Date Nights — three intimate evenings in Wollongong with Alyssa Booth and Susanna Alvarado covering movement, positioning, birth values and navigating the maternity system.
Meet Alyssa Booth — Wollongong-based birth doula, babywearing consultant and childbirth educator passionate about informed, supported birth.
